headline: Open Data Portal Has Only 18% of Government Datasets
context: Malaysia open data portal data.gov.my contains only 18% of identified government datasets limiting transparency.

cards.big: Government open data portal has only 18% of identified datasets
cards.sub: Low availability hampers transparency research and civic innovation

cards.big: Portal hosts 14,200 datasets but 45% outdated by more than 2 years
cards.sub: Real-time or quarterly-updated datasets number only 2,800 of total

cards.big: Only 22 of 78 federal agencies meet minimum publishing requirements
cards.sub: Health education and finance among agencies with lowest compliance

cards.big: South Korea portal has 82% coverage generating USD5 billion value
cards.sub: Malaysia limited availability restricts potential RM8 billion opportunity

cards.big: Open data gaps test whether government transparency commitments produce actual public data
18% of government datasets on the open data portal. Transparency requires releasing data, not just building portals.
